props.cellSize: Sets size of each legend cell. A single value sets both width and height. Accepts `[width, height]` tuple.
props.disabledColors: Set of color values currently disabled. Toggled by clicking a legend cell.
props.labels: Tuple of text labels shown around the threshold cells. Pass empty strings to hide individual labels.
props.thresholds: Either a list of `{ min, color }` thresholds or a linear scale `{ from, to }`, shared with the parent `v-heatmap`. Linear scales render as a gradient bar.
